title: Dummy  Items
description: a small mod that adds dummy items for map makers and datapacks
body:
# ###

due to recent changes in 26.1, i cant figure out how to make all the items share a single model like before (it just doesnt work T^T), fixing that would make the file size alot bigger and while i may go back to fix this later, for now, dummy items is discontinued

the aim of this mod is to add enough dummy items (all of which can be obtained through a give command) that map makers and datapack developers have the means to essentially add custom items through components without the need to mod them in themselves :3

**

(there are currently 999 dummy items in 1.1d+1.21.2 and there are no plans to up that number)

** # ![ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HzGKYCev/images/88d416cf2bbb10d363b10e5c3fa256c585ed6e88.png) #

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3

**

Q: Will this mod be made available for other versions/loaders

**

A: there are no plans to support versions under 1.21.2, however future versions will be supported

**

Q: Bedrock support?

**

A: you can't even use what this mod is made for in bedrock why would you ask that 😭

**

Q: Can you add more dummy items?

**

A: WHY DO YOU NEED MORE THAN 999 OF THEM (but yes, yes he can)
